     2	using System.Collections.Generic;
     3	
     4	/// <summary>
     5	/// Data computed resolver 注册表。
     6	/// </summary>
     7	public sealed class DataComputeRegistry
     8	{
     9	    private readonly Dictionary<string, IDataComputeResolver> _resolvers = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
    10	
    11	    /// <summary>
    12	    /// 注册 computed resolver。
    13	    /// </summary>
    14	    /// <param name="resolver">computed resolver。</param>
    15	    public void Register(IDataComputeResolver resolver)
    16	    {
    17	        ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(resolver);
    18	        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(resolver.ComputeId))
    19	        {
    20	            throw new InvalidOperationException("Data compute resolver 的 ComputeId 不能为空。");
    21	        }
    22	
    23	        if (!_resolvers.TryAdd(resolver.ComputeId, resolver))
    24	        {
    25	            throw new InvalidOperationException($"重复 Data compute resolver：{resolver.ComputeId}");
    26	        }
    27	    }
    28	
    29	    /// <summary>
    30	    /// 检查 resolver 是否存在。
    31	    /// </summary>
    32	    /// <param name="computeId">computed resolver id。</param>
    33	    public bool Contains(string computeId)
    34	    {
    35	        return _resolvers.ContainsKey(computeId);
    36	    }
    37	
    38	    /// <summary>
    39	    /// 获取 resolver，未注册时报错。
    40	    /// </summary>
    41	    /// <param name="computeId">computed resolver id。</param>
    42	    public IDataComputeResolver GetRequired(string computeId)
    43	    {
    44	        if (_resolvers.TryGetValue(computeId, out var resolver))
    45	        {
    46	            return resolver;
    47	        }
    48	
    49	        throw new KeyNotFoundException($"未注册 Data compute resolver：{computeId}");
    50	    }
    51	}
    52	
    53	/// <summary>
    54	/// Data computed 字段的纯计算 resolver。
    55	/// </summary>
    56	public interface IDataComputeResolver
    57	{
    58	    /// <summary>
    59	    /// descriptor 中引用的计算语义 id。
    60	    /// </summary>
    61	    string ComputeId { get; }
    62	
    63	    /// <summary>
    64	    /// 计算字段值。
    65	    /// </summary>
    66	    /// <param name="data">当前 Data 容器。</param>
    67	    /// <param name="definition">字段定义。</param>
    68	    object? Compute(Data data, DataDefinition definition);
    69	}
    70	
    71	/// <summary>
    72	/// 基础属性百分比加成 resolver。
    73	/// </summary>
    74	public sealed class AttributeBonusComputeResolver : IDataComputeResolver
    75	{
    76	    /// <summary>
    77	    /// descriptor 中引用的计算语义 id。
    78	    /// </summary>
    79	    public string ComputeId => "AttributeBonus";
    80	
    81	    /// <summary>
    82	    /// 按 base * (1 + bonus / 100) 计算最终属性。
    83	    /// </summary>
    84	    /// <param name="data">当前 Data 容器。</param>
    85	    /// <param name="definition">字段定义。</param>
    86	    public object? Compute(Data data, DataDefinition definition)
    87	    {
    88	        var baseValue = data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[0]);
    89	        var bonus = definition.Dependencies.Count > 1 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[1]) : 0f;
    90	        return baseValue * (1f + bonus / 100f);
    91	    }
    92	}
    93	
    94	/// <summary>
    95	/// 当前值 / 最大值百分比 resolver。
    96	/// </summary>
    97	public sealed class PercentComputeResolver : IDataComputeResolver
    98	{
    99	    /// <summary>
   100	    /// descriptor 中引用的计算语义 id。
   101	    /// </summary>
   102	    public string ComputeId => "Percent";
   103	
   104	    /// <summary>
   105	    /// 按 current / max * 100 计算百分比。
   106	    /// </summary>
   107	    /// <param name="data">当前 Data 容器。</param>
   108	    /// <param name="definition">字段定义。</param>
   109	    public object? Compute(Data data, DataDefinition definition)
   110	    {
   111	        var current = data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[0]);
   112	        var max = definition.Dependencies.Count > 1 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[1]) : 0f;
   113	        return max > 0f ? current / max * 100f : 0f;
   114	    }
   115	}
   116	
   117	/// <summary>
   118	/// 攻击间隔 resolver。
   119	/// </summary>
   120	public sealed class AttackIntervalComputeResolver : IDataComputeResolver
   121	{
   122	    /// <summary>
   123	    /// descriptor 中引用的计算语义 id。
   124	    /// </summary>
   125	    public string ComputeId => "AttackInterval";
   126	
   127	    /// <summary>
   128	    /// 按 1 / (attackSpeed / 100) 计算攻击间隔。
   129	    /// </summary>
   130	    /// <param name="data">当前 Data 容器。</param>
   131	    /// <param name="definition">字段定义。</param>
   132	    public object? Compute(Data data, DataDefinition definition)
   133	    {
   134	        var speed = data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[0]);
   135	        return speed > 0f ? 1f / (speed / 100f) : 0f;
   136	    }
   137	}
   138	
   139	/// <summary>
   140	/// 基础恢复 + 最大值百分比恢复 resolver。
   141	/// </summary>
   142	public sealed class RegenComputeResolver : IDataComputeResolver
   143	{
   144	    /// <summary>
   145	    /// descriptor 中引用的计算语义 id。
   146	    /// </summary>
   147	    public string ComputeId => "Regen";
   148	
   149	    /// <summary>
   150	    /// 按 base regen * (1 + bonus / 100) + max * percent / 100 计算恢复值。
   151	    /// </summary>
   152	    /// <param name="data">当前 Data 容器。</param>
   153	    /// <param name="definition">字段定义。</param>
   154	    public object? Compute(Data data, DataDefinition definition)
   155	    {
   156	        var baseRegen = data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[0]);
   157	        var bonus = definition.Dependencies.Count > 1 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[1]) : 0f;
   158	        var percent = definition.Dependencies.Count > 2 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[2]) : 0f;
   159	        var max = definition.Dependencies.Count > 3 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[3]) : 0f;
   160	        return baseRegen * (1f + bonus / 100f) + max * (percent / 100f);
   161	    }
   162	}
   163	
   164	/// <summary>
   165	/// 有效生命 resolver。
   166	/// </summary>
   167	public sealed class EffectiveHpComputeResolver : IDataComputeResolver
   168	{
   169	    /// <summary>
   170	    /// descriptor 中引用的计算语义 id。
   171	    /// </summary>
   172	    public string ComputeId => "EffectiveHp";
   173	
   174	    /// <summary>
   175	    /// 按 hp * (1 + defense / 100) 计算有效生命。
   176	    /// </summary>
   177	    /// <param name="data">当前 Data 容器。</param>
   178	    /// <param name="definition">字段定义。</param>
   179	    public object? Compute(Data data, DataDefinition definition)
   180	    {
   181	        var hp = data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[0]);
   182	        var defense = definition.Dependencies.Count > 1 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[1]) : 0f;
   183	        return hp * (1f + defense / 100f);
   184	    }
   185	}
   186	
   187	/// <summary>
   188	/// 每秒伤害估算 resolver。
   189	/// </summary>
   190	public sealed class DpsComputeResolver : IDataComputeResolver
   191	{
   192	    /// <summary>
   193	    /// descriptor 中引用的计算语义 id。
   194	    /// </summary>
   195	    public string ComputeId => "Dps";
   196	
   197	    /// <summary>
   198	    /// 按 attack * attackSpeed / 100 * crit multiplier 计算 DPS。
   199	    /// </summary>
   200	    /// <param name="data">当前 Data 容器。</param>
   201	    /// <param name="definition">字段定义。</param>
   202	    public object? Compute(Data data, DataDefinition definition)
   203	    {
   204	        var attack = data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[0]);
   205	        var speed = definition.Dependencies.Count > 1 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[1]) : 0f;
   206	        var critRate = definition.Dependencies.Count > 2 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[2]) : 0f;
   207	        var critDamage = definition.Dependencies.Count > 3 ? data.Get<float>(definition.Dependencies[3]) : 100f;
   208	        var critMultiplier = 1f + (critRate / 100f) * (critDamage / 100f);
   209	        return attack * (speed / 100f) * critMultiplier;
   210	    }
   211	}

     6	/// <summary>
     7	/// 事件优先级
     8	/// 数值越大越优先执行
     9	/// </summary>
    10	public enum EventPriority
    11	{
    12	    Monitor = -100,  // 最后执行，用于监控或后期处理
    13	    Lowest = -50,
    14	    Low = -10,
    15	    Normal = 0,
    16	    High = 10,
    17	    Highest = 50,
    18	    Critical = 100   // 最先执行，用于关键逻辑
    19	}
    20	
    21	/// <summary>
    22	/// 通用游戏事件总线
    23	/// 以 payload 类型（readonly record struct）作为事件标识，替代旧字符串主键。
    24	/// 支持泛型数据传递、优先级排序、一次性订阅。
    25	/// <para>typeof(T) 在泛型方法中是 JIT 常量，无反射开销。</para>
    26	/// </summary>
    27	public class EventBus
    28	{
    29	    private static readonly Log _log = new Log("EventBus");
    30	
    31	    /// <summary>
    32	    /// 事件订阅封装
    33	    /// </summary>
    34	    private class Subscription
    35	    {
    36	        /// <summary>
    37	        /// 事件类型（payload 的 Type）
    38	        /// </summary>
    39	        public Type EventType { get; set; }
    40	
    41	        /// <summary>
    42	        /// 事件处理器委托
    43	        /// </summary>
    44	        public Delegate Handler { get; set; }
    45	
    46	        /// <summary>
    47	        /// 优先级，数值越大越优先
    48	        /// </summary>
    49	        public int Priority { get; set; }
    50	
    51	        /// <summary>
    52	        /// 是否一次性订阅
    53	        /// </summary>
    54	        public bool Once { get; set; }
    55	
    56	        // 标记是否已被移除（处理迭代期间的安全删除）
    57	        public bool IsPendingRemoval { get; set; } = false;
    58	
    59	        public Subscription(Type eventType, Delegate handler, int priority, bool once)
    60	        {
    61	            EventType = eventType;
    62	            Handler = handler;
    63	            Priority = priority;
    64	            Once = once;
    65	        }
    66	    }
    67	
    68	    // 事件存储字典：payload Type -> 订阅列表
    69	    private readonly Dictionary<Type, List<Subscription>> _subscriptions = new();
    70	
    71	    // 防止在 Emit 过程中修改列表导致的集合修改异常
    72	    private int _emittingCount = 0;
    73	    private readonly List<Subscription> _pendingRemovals = new();
    74	
    75	    // 重入保护：追踪正在执行的事件类型，防止同类型事件递归触发
    76	    private readonly HashSet<Type> _emittingEvents = new();
    77	
    78	    // ==================== 订阅 (Subscribe) ====================
    79	
    80	    /// <summary>
    81	    /// 订阅带参数的事件，payload 类型 T 即事件标识
    82	    /// </summary>
    83	    public void On<T>(Action<T> handler, int priority = (int)EventPriority.Normal) where T : struct
    84	    {
    85	        Subscribe<T>(handler, priority, false);
    86	    }
    87	
    88	    /// <summary>
    89	    /// 订阅一次性事件（带参数）
    90	    /// </summary>
    91	    public void Once<T>(Action<T> handler, int priority = (int)EventPriority.Normal) where T : struct
    92	    {
    93	        Subscribe<T>(handler, priority, true);
    94	    }
    95	
    96	    private void Subscribe<T>(Delegate handler, int priority, bool once) where T : struct
    97	    {
    98	        if (handler == null)
    99	        {
   100	            _log.Error($"尝试订阅空处理器: {typeof(T).Name}");
   101	            return;
   102	        }
   103	
   104	        var key = typeof(T);
   105	        if (!_subscriptions.TryGetValue(key, out var list))
   106	        {
   107	            list = new List<Subscription>();
   108	            _subscriptions[key] = list;
   109	        }
   110	
   111	        var sub = new Subscription(key, handler, priority, once);
   112	        list.Add(sub);
   113	        list.Sort((a, b) => b.Priority.CompareTo(a.Priority));
   114	    }
   115	
   116	    /// <summary>
   117	    /// 动态订阅事件（用于运行时通过反射/配置订阅的场景）
   118	    /// </summary>
   119	    public void OnDynamic(Type eventType, Action<object> handler, int priority = (int)EventPriority.Normal)
   120	    {
   121	        if (handler == null) return;
   122	        if (!_subscriptions.TryGetValue(eventType, out var list))
   123	        {
   124	            list = new List<Subscription>();
   125	            _subscriptions[eventType] = list;
   126	        }
   127	        var sub = new Subscription(eventType, handler, priority, false);
   128	        list.Add(sub);
   129	        list.Sort((a, b) => b.Priority.CompareTo(a.Priority));
   130	    }
   131	
   132	    // ==================== 取消订阅 (Unsubscribe) ====================
   133	
   134	    /// <summary>
   135	    /// 取消订阅带参数的事件
   136	    /// </summary>
   137	    public void Off<T>(Action<T> handler) where T : struct
   138	    {
   139	        Unsubscribe<T>(handler);
   140	    }
   141	
   142	    private void Unsubscribe<T>(Delegate handler) where T : struct
   143	    {
   144	        var key = typeof(T);
   145	        if (!_subscriptions.TryGetValue(key, out var list)) return;
   146	
   147	        var target = list.FirstOrDefault(s => s.Handler == handler);
   148	        if (target != null)
   149	        {
   150	            RemoveSubscription(target, list);
   151	        }
   152	    }
   153	
   154	    /// <summary>
   155	    /// 动态取消订阅事件
   156	    /// </summary>
   157	    public void OffDynamic(Type eventType, Action<object> handler)
   158	    {
   159	        if (!_subscriptions.TryGetValue(eventType, out var list)) return;
   160	        var target = list.FirstOrDefault(s => s.Handler == handler);
   161	        if (target != null)
   162	        {
   163	            RemoveSubscription(target, list);
   164	        }
   165	    }
   166	
   167	    private void RemoveSubscription(Subscription sub, List<Subscription> list)
   168	    {
   169	        if (_emittingCount > 0)
   170	        {
   171	            sub.IsPendingRemoval = true;
   172	            _pendingRemovals.Add(sub);
   173	        }
   174	        else
   175	        {
   176	            list.Remove(sub);
   177	            if (list.Count == 0)
   178	            {
   179	                _subscriptions.Remove(sub.EventType);
   180	            }
   181	        }
   182	    }
   183	
   184	    // ==================== 触发 (Emit) ====================
   185	
   186	    /// <summary>
   187	    /// 触发事件，payload 类型 T 即事件标识
   188	    /// </summary>
   189	    public void Emit<T>(in T data) where T : struct
   190	    {
   191	        Trigger(in data);
   192	    }
   193	
   194	    /// <summary>
   195	    /// 动态触发事件（用于 Feature 系统等运行时场景，通过反射调用泛型 Trigger）。
   196	    /// 性能低于泛型 Emit，仅用于数据驱动场景。
   197	    /// </summary>
   198	    public void EmitDynamic(object eventData)
   199	    {
   200	        if (eventData == null) return;
   201	        var eventType = eventData.GetType();
   202	        var triggerMethod = typeof(EventBus).GetMethod(
   203	            nameof(TriggerDynamicInner),
   204	            System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Instance);
   205	        if (triggerMethod == null) return;
   206	        var generic = triggerMethod.MakeGenericMethod(eventType);
   207	        generic.Invoke(this, new[] { eventData });
   208	    }
   209	
   210	    private void TriggerDynamicInner<T>(object data) where T : struct
   211	    {
   212	        Trigger((T)data);
   213	    }
   214	
   215	    private void Trigger<T>(in T data) where T : struct
   216	    {
   217	        var key = typeof(T);
   218	
   219	        // 重入检测：阻止同类型事件递归触发
   220	        if (_emittingEvents.Contains(key))
   221	        {
   222	            _log.Warn($"检测到事件重入，已阻止: [{key.Name}]");
   223	            return;
   224	        }
   225	
   226	        if (!_subscriptions.TryGetValue(key, out var list) || list.Count == 0)
   227	        {
   228	            return;
   229	        }
   230	
   231	        _emittingEvents.Add(key);
   232	        _emittingCount++;
   233	        try
   234	        {
   235	            int count = list.Count;
   236	            for (int i = 0; i < count; i++)
   237	            {
   238	                var sub = list[i];
   239	                if (sub.IsPendingRemoval) continue;
   240	
   241	                try
   242	                {
   243	                    // 带参处理器：直接强转 Action<T>，避免反射
   244	                    if (sub.Handler is Action<T> typedHandler)
   245	                    {
   246	                        typedHandler(data);
   247	                    }
   248	                    else if (sub.Handler is Action<object> objectHandler)
   249	                    {
   250	                        objectHandler(data);
   251	                    }
   252	                    else
   253	                    {
   254	                        _log.Warn($"事件 [{key.Name}] 类型不匹配: " +
   255	                                 $"订阅者需要 {sub.Handler.GetType()}, " +
   256	                                 $"但事件数据是 Action<{typeof(T)}>");
   257	                    }
   258	
   259	                    if (sub.Once)
   260	                    {
   261	                        RemoveSubscription(sub, list);
   262	                    }
   263	                }
   264	                catch (Exception ex)
   265	                {
   266	                    _log.Error($"事件处理异常 [{key.Name}]: {ex.Message}\n{ex.StackTrace}");
   267	                }
   268	            }
   269	        }
   270	        finally
   271	        {
   272	            _emittingCount--;
   273	            _emittingEvents.Remove(key);
   274	            if (_emittingCount <= 0)
   275	            {
   276	                ProcessPendingRemovals();
   277	            }
   278	        }
   279	    }
   280	
   281	    /// <summary>
   282	    /// 处理延迟移除的订阅
   283	    /// </summary>
   284	    private void ProcessPendingRemovals()
   285	    {
   286	        if (_pendingRemovals.Count == 0) return;
   287	
   288	        foreach (var sub in _pendingRemovals)
   289	        {
   290	            if (_subscriptions.TryGetValue(sub.EventType, out var list))
   291	            {
   292	                list.Remove(sub);
   293	                if (list.Count == 0)
   294	                {
   295	                    _subscriptions.Remove(sub.EventType);
   296	                }
   297	            }
   298	        }
   299	        _pendingRemovals.Clear();
   300	    }
   301	
   302	    // ==================== 管理 ====================
   303	
   304	    /// <summary>
   305	    /// 清除指定事件类型的所有订阅
   306	    /// </summary>
   307	    public void ClearEvent<T>() where T : struct
   308	    {
   309	        _subscriptions.Remove(typeof(T));
   310	    }
   311	
   312	    /// <summary>
   313	    /// 清空所有订阅
   314	    /// </summary>
   315	    public void Clear()
   316	    {
   317	        _subscriptions.Clear();
   318	        _pendingRemovals.Clear();
   319	        _emittingCount = 0;
   320	        _log.Debug("EventBus 已清空");
   321	    }
   322	}

     1	/// <summary>
     2	/// 事件上下文基类
     3	/// 
     4	/// Context Object Pattern 用于事件系统中的"请求-响应"模式：
     5	/// - 发布者创建 Context 对象并通过事件传递
     6	/// - 订阅者修改 Context（填写结果、设置阻止等）
     7	/// - 发布者读取 Context 获取处理结果
     8	/// 
     9	/// 详细设计文档：DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Event/Event系统说明.md
    10	/// </summary>
    11	public class EventContext
    12	{
    13	    // ================= 流程控制 =================
    14	
    15	    /// <summary>
    16	    /// 是否已处理（任一订阅者标记后保持）
    17	    /// </summary>
    18	    public bool IsHandled { get; protected set; }
    19	
    20	    /// <summary>
    21	    /// 是否阻止后续订阅者执行
    22	    /// 类似 DOM Event 的 stopPropagation()
    23	    /// </summary>
    24	    public bool IsPropagationStopped { get; private set; }
    25	
    26	    /// <summary>
    27	    /// 阻止事件继续传播给后续订阅者
    28	    /// </summary>
    29	    public void StopPropagation() => IsPropagationStopped = true;
    30	
    31	    // ================= 结果状态 =================
    32	
    33	    /// <summary>
    34	    /// 操作/检查是否成功（默认 true）
    35	    /// - 对于检查型事件：true 表示允许，false 表示阻止
    36	    /// - 对于操作型事件：true 表示成功，false 表示失败
    37	    /// </summary>
    38	    public bool Success { get; protected set; } = true;
    39	
    40	    /// <summary>
    41	    /// 失败/阻止原因
    42	    /// </summary>
    43	    public string? FailReason { get; protected set; }
    44	
    45	    /// <summary>
    46	    /// 标记为失败或阻止
    47	    /// </summary>
    48	    /// <param name="reason">原因</param>
    49	    public void SetFailed(string reason)
    50	    {
    51	        Success = false;
    52	        IsHandled = true;
    53	        // 记录第一个失败原因
    54	        FailReason ??= reason;
    55	    }
    56	
    57	    // ================= 通用结果返回 =================
    58	
    59	    /// <summary>
    60	    /// 通用结果存储（用于事件处理器返回强类型结果）
    61	    /// 使用示例：
    62	    /// <code>
    63	    /// var ctx = new EventContext();
    64	    /// Events.Emit(new GameEventType.Ability.TryTrigger(ctx));
    65	    /// var result = ctx.GetResult&lt;TriggerResult&gt;();
    66	    /// </code>
    67	    /// </summary>
    68	    private object? _result;
    69	
    70	    /// <summary>
    71	    /// 设置强类型结果
    72	    /// </summary>
    73	    public void SetResult<T>(T result)
    74	    {
    75	        _result = result;
    76	        IsHandled = true;
    77	    }
    78	
    79	    /// <summary>
    80	    /// 获取强类型结果
    81	    /// </summary>
    82	    public T? GetResult<T>()
    83	    {
    84	        return _result is T typedResult ? typedResult : default;
    85	    }
    86	
    87	    /// <summary>
    88	    /// 检查是否有结果
    89	    /// </summary>
    90	    public bool HasResult => _result != null;
    91	}
     1	/// <summary>
     2	/// Feature 上下文 - 贯穿一次生命周期操作与 Action 执行的统一上下文对象
     3	///
     4	/// 在 Granted/Removed/Activated/Execute/Ended 各阶段传递，也可直接作为 IFeatureAction.Execute 的数据载体。
     5	/// 刻意不包含任何子系统专有类型（如 AbilityEntity / CastContext），
     6	/// 保持 FeatureSystem 对上层系统的零依赖。
     7	/// 调用方（如 AbilitySystem）自行将专有数据塞入 ActivationData，从 ExecuteResult 读取执行结果。
     8	///
     9	/// 输入/输出对称设计：
    10	/// - 输入：ActivationData（object?）— 调用方写入，Handler 读取并转型
    11	/// - 输出：ExecuteResult（object?）— Handler 通过 OnExecute 返回值写入，调用方读取并转型
    12	/// </summary>
    13	public class FeatureContext
    14	{
    15	    /// <summary>拥有该 Feature 的实体</summary>
    16	    public IEntity? Owner { get; set; }
    17	
    18	    /// <summary>Feature 实体（承载 Data 与 Events 的任意 IEntity）</summary>
    19	    public IEntity? Feature { get; set; }
    20	
    21	    /// <summary>运行时实例（含 Owner/FeatureEntity 及状态快捷访问）</summary>
    22	    public FeatureInstance? Instance { get; set; }
    23	
    24	    /// <summary>
    25	    /// 单次运行阶段的来源上下文（Activated/Execute/Ended 时才有，Granted/Removed 时为 null）
    26	    /// 类型由调用方决定，如 AbilitySystem 传入 CastContext，
    27	    /// IFeatureHandler 通过 ctx.ActivationData as CastContext 取用。
    28	    /// </summary>
    29	    public object? ActivationData { get; set; }
    30	
    31	    /// <summary>
    32	    /// OnExecute 阶段的返回值。
    33	    /// 与 ActivationData（输入）对称设计：FeatureSystem 层面是 object?，
    34	    /// 子系统层面自行转型为专有类型（如 AbilityExecutedResult）。
    35	    /// </summary>
    36	    public object? ExecuteResult { get; set; }
    37	
    38	    /// <summary>触发源事件数据（OnEvent 触发时携带，其余为 null）</summary>
    39	    public object? Source { get; set; }
    40	
    41	    //=======================Action的参数=====================
    42	    /// <summary>Action 侧对 Source 的语义别名</summary>
    43	    public object? Trigger
    44	    {
    45	        get => Source;
    46	        set => Source = value;
    47	    }
    48	
    49	    /// <summary>Action 间共享的临时数据（跨 Action 传值用）</summary>
    50	    public System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, object> ExtraData { get; } = new();
    51	}
     1	/// <summary>
     2	/// Feature 处理器接口 - 提供代码驱动的完整生命周期钩子
     3	///
     4	/// 适用场景：
     5	/// - 需要在授予/移除时执行复杂逻辑（超出修改器能表达的范围）
     6	/// - 需要在激活时执行自定义效果并返回结果（配合 AbilitySystem 使用）
     7	/// - 需要在启用/禁用时响应状态变化（如被动光环暂停/恢复）
     8	///
     9	/// 完整生命周期：Granted → [Enabled ⇄ Disabled] → [Activated → Execute → Ended]* → Removed
    10	///
    11	/// 简单属性类 Feature（只加减属性）无需实现此接口，
    12	/// 直接在 DataOS Feature.Modifiers 中配置即可。
    13	///
    14	/// 注册方式：在 [ModuleInitializer] 方法中调用 FeatureHandlerRegistry.Register(new MyHandler())
    15	/// </summary>
    16	public interface IFeatureHandler
    17	{
    18	    /// <summary>
    19	    /// Feature 标识符（完整唯一 ID，对应 snapshot FeatureHandlerId 字段）
    20	    /// </summary>
    21	    string FeatureId { get; }
    22	
    23	    // ===== 一次性：授予/移除 =====
    24	
    25	    /// <summary>Feature 被授予时调用（Granted 阶段）</summary>
    26	    /// <param name="context">包含 Owner 和 Feature 的上下文</param>
    27	    void OnGranted(FeatureContext context) { }
    28	
    29	    /// <summary>Feature 被移除时调用（Removed 阶段，早于修改器回滚）</summary>
    30	    /// <param name="context">包含 Owner 和 Feature 的上下文</param>
    31	    void OnRemoved(FeatureContext context) { }
    32	
    33	    // ===== 启用/禁用 =====
    34	
    35	    /// <summary>
    36	    /// Feature 被启用时调用（Enable 阶段，可选）
    37	    /// 适用于被动光环等需要在启用时恢复效果的 Feature
    38	    /// </summary>
    39	    void OnEnabled(FeatureContext context) { }
    40	
    41	    /// <summary>
    42	    /// Feature 被禁用时调用（Disable 阶段，可选）
    43	    /// 适用于被动光环等需要在禁用时暂停效果的 Feature
    44	    /// </summary>
    45	    void OnDisabled(FeatureContext context) { }
    46	
    47	    // ===== 激活/执行/结束 =====
    48	
    49	    /// <summary>
    50	    /// Feature 一次运行开始时调用（Activated 阶段，可选）
    51	    /// 通知阶段：Feature 已进入激活态，用于启动前摇、锁定状态、运行上下文等前置操作。
    52	    /// 适用于 Manual / OnEvent / Periodic 触发模式的 Feature。
    53	    /// </summary>
    54	    void OnActivated(FeatureContext context) { }
    55	
    56	    /// <summary>
    57	    /// Feature 执行效果并返回结果（Execute 阶段，可选）
    58	    /// 命令阶段：在 Activated 之后、Ended 之前调用，用于执行具体效果。
    59	    /// 返回值通过 FeatureContext.ExecuteResult 传递给调用方。
    60	    /// 返回 null 表示该 Feature 没有执行结果（如被动光环、纯数据 Feature）。
    61	    /// </summary>
    62	    object? OnExecute(FeatureContext context) => null;
    63	
    64	    /// <summary>
    65	    /// Feature 一次运行结束时调用（Ended 阶段，可选）
    66	    /// 用于按结束原因清理本次运行创建的临时状态、计时器、特效或订阅。
    67	    /// </summary>
    68	    void OnEnded(FeatureContext context, FeatureEndReason reason) { }
    69	}

     4	/// <summary>
     5	/// Feature 系统 - 管理 Feature 完整生命周期
     6	///
     7	/// 生命周期：Granted → [Enabled ⇄ Disabled] → [Activated → Execute → Ended]* → Removed
     8	///
     9	/// 主要职责：
    10	/// - Granted：应用数据驱动 Modifier + 调用 IFeatureHandler.OnGranted
    11	/// - Removed：调用 IFeatureHandler.OnRemoved + 按来源批量回滚 Modifier

    14	/// - Activated：调用 IFeatureHandler.OnActivated（运行开始）+ 发出 Feature.Activated + OnExecute（效果执行）+ 发出 Feature.Executed
    15	/// - Ended：调用 IFeatureHandler.OnEnded + 发出 Feature.Ended 事件
    16	/// - ExecuteActions：批量执行 IFeatureAction 列表
    17	///
    18	/// 设计原则：只依赖 IEntity，不引入任何子系统专有类型（无 AbilityEntity / CastContext）。
    19	/// 调用方（如 AbilitySystem）在调用前自行构建 FeatureContext，将专有数据放入 ActivationData，
    20	/// 从 ExecuteResult 读取执行结果。
    21	///
    22	/// 挂载点（调用方）：
    23	/// - AbilityInventoryService.AddAbility → OnFeatureGranted
    24	/// - AbilityInventoryService.RemoveAbility → OnFeatureRemoved（Destroy 之前）
    25	/// - AbilitySystem（或其他激活方）→ 自建 FeatureContext → OnFeatureActivated / OnFeatureEnded
    26	/// </summary>
    27	public static class FeatureSystem
    28	{
    29	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(FeatureSystem));

    31	    // ==================== Granted ====================
    32	
    33	    /// <summary>Feature 被授予时调用（由 AbilityInventoryService.AddAbility 触发）</summary>
    34	    public static void OnFeatureGranted(IEntity feature, IEntity owner)
    35	    {
    36	        if (feature == null || owner == null) return;
    37	
    38	        feature.Data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureIsActive, false);
    39	
    40	        var instance = new FeatureInstance(owner, feature, Godot.Time.GetTicksUsec() / 1_000_000.0);
    41	        var context = new FeatureContext { Owner = owner, Feature = feature, Instance = instance };
    42	
    43	        // 1. 应用数据驱动修改器（Permanent Feature 最常用）
    44	        ApplyModifiers(feature, owner);
    45	
    46	        // 2. 调用代码处理器钩子
    47	        var handlerId = GetFeatureHandlerId(feature);
    48	        FeatureHandlerRegistry.Get(handlerId)?.OnGranted(context);
    49	
    50	        // 3. 发出 Granted 事件（Owner 局部总线）
    51	        owner.Events.Emit(
    52	            new GameEventType.Feature.Granted(feature, owner)
    53	        );
    54	
    55	        _log.Debug($"Feature Granted: {feature.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name)} -> {owner}");
    56	    }
    57	
    58	    // ==================== Removed ====================
    59	
    60	    /// <summary>Feature 被移除时调用（由 AbilityInventoryService.RemoveAbility 触发，在 Destroy 之前）</summary>
    61	    public static void OnFeatureRemoved(IEntity feature, IEntity owner)
    62	    {
    63	        if (feature == null || owner == null) return;
    64	
    65	        var instance = new FeatureInstance(owner, feature, 0);
    66	        var context = new FeatureContext { Owner = owner, Feature = feature, Instance = instance };
    67	        var name = feature.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name) ?? "";
    68	
    69	        // 1. 先调用处理器（处理器可能依赖修改器数据）
    70	        var handlerId = GetFeatureHandlerId(feature);

    82	    }
    83	
    84	    // ==================== Activated ====================
    85	
    86	    /// <summary>
    87	    /// Feature 一次激活开始时调用。
    88	    /// 调用方负责构建 FeatureContext（Owner / Feature / ActivationData）。
    89	    /// 调用顺序：OnActivated（运行开始）→ 发出 Activated 事件 → OnExecute（执行+结果）→ 累计次数 → 发出 Executed 事件
    90	    /// </summary>
    91	    public static void OnFeatureActivated(FeatureContext ctx)
    92	    {
    93	        if (ctx?.Owner == null || ctx.Feature == null) return;
    94	
    95	        if (ctx.Instance == null)
    96	            ctx.Instance = new FeatureInstance(ctx.Owner, ctx.Feature, 0);
    97	
    98	        ctx.Feature.Data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureIsActive, true);
    99	
   100	        // 调用代码处理器
   101	        var handlerId = GetFeatureHandlerId(ctx.Feature);
   102	        var handler = FeatureHandlerRegistry.Get(handlerId);
   103	
   104	        // 1. 运行开始阶段
   105	        try
   106	        {
   107	            handler?.OnActivated(ctx);
   108	        }
   109	        catch (System.Exception ex)
   110	        {
   111	            _log.Error($"FeatureHandler {handlerId} OnActivated 异常: {ex.Message}");
   112	        }
   113	
   114	        // 2. 发出 Activated 事件（Feature 局部总线），表示本次运行已开始
   115	        ctx.Feature.Events.Emit(
   116	            new GameEventType.Feature.Activated(ctx)
   117	        );
   118	
   119	        // 3. 执行阶段（结果写入 ctx.ExecuteResult）
   120	        if (handler != null)
   121	        {
   122	            try
   123	            {
   124	                ctx.ExecuteResult = handler.OnExecute(ctx);
   125	            }
   126	            catch (System.Exception ex)
   127	            {
   128	                _log.Error($"FeatureHandler {handlerId} OnExecute 异常: {ex.Message}");
   129	            }
   130	        }
   131	
   132	        // 4. 累计执行次数
   133	        int current = ctx.Feature.Data.Get<int>(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureActivationCount);
   134	        ctx.Feature.Data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureActivationCount, current + 1);
   135	
   136	        // 5. 发出 Executed 事件（Feature 局部总线），表示核心效果已执行
   137	        ctx.Feature.Events.Emit(
   138	            new GameEventType.Feature.Executed(ctx)
   139	        );
   140	    }
   141	
   142	    // ==================== Ended ====================
   143	
   144	    /// <summary>

   147	    /// </summary>
   148	    public static void OnFeatureEnded(FeatureContext ctx, FeatureEndReason reason = FeatureEndReason.Completed)
   149	    {
   150	        if (ctx?.Owner == null || ctx.Feature == null) return;
   151	
   152	        ctx.Feature.Data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureIsActive, false);
   153	
   154	        // 调用代码处理器
   155	        var handlerId = GetFeatureHandlerId(ctx.Feature);
   156	        try
   157	        {
   158	            FeatureHandlerRegistry.Get(handlerId)?.OnEnded(ctx, reason);
   159	        }
   160	        catch (System.Exception ex)

   162	            _log.Error($"FeatureHandler {handlerId} OnEnded 异常: {ex.Message}");
   163	        }
   164	
   165	        // 发出 Ended 事件（Feature 局部总线）
   166	        ctx.Feature.Events.Emit(
   167	            new GameEventType.Feature.Ended(ctx, reason)
   168	        );
   169	    }
   170	
   171	    // ==================== Enable / Disable ====================
   172	
   173	    /// <summary>启用 Feature（从禁用状态恢复）</summary>
   174	    public static void EnableFeature(IEntity feature, IEntity owner)
   175	    {
   176	        if (feature == null || owner == null) return;
   177	
   178	        feature.Data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureEnabled, true);
   179	
   180	        // 调用代码处理器
   181	        var handlerId = GetFeatureHandlerId(feature);
   182	        var ctx = new FeatureContext { Owner = owner, Feature = feature };
   183	        FeatureHandlerRegistry.Get(handlerId)?.OnEnabled(ctx);
   184

   187	        );
   188	
   189	        _log.Debug($"Feature Enabled: {feature.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name)}");
   190	    }
   191	
   192	    /// <summary>禁用 Feature（保留在宿主上，但暂停响应）</summary>
   193	    public static void DisableFeature(IEntity feature, IEntity owner)
   194	    {
   195	        if (feature == null || owner == null) return;
   196	
   197	        feature.Data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureEnabled, false);
   198	
   199	        // 调用代码处理器
   200	        var handlerId = GetFeatureHandlerId(feature);
   201	        var ctx = new FeatureContext { Owner = owner, Feature = feature };
   202	        FeatureHandlerRegistry.Get(handlerId)?.OnDisabled(ctx);
   203	
   204	        owner.Events.Emit(
   205	            new GameEventType.Feature.Disabled(feature, owner)
   206	        );
   207	
   208	        _log.Debug($"Feature Disabled: {feature.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name)}");
   209	    }
   210	
   211	    // ==================== Action 执行 ====================
   212	
   213	    /// <summary>
   214	    /// 批量执行 IFeatureAction 列表
   215	    ///
   216	    /// 在 IFeatureHandler.OnGranted/OnActivated 内使用：
   217	    /// <code>FeatureSystem.ExecuteActions(myActions, ctx);</code>
   218	    /// </summary>
   219	    public static void ExecuteActions(IEnumerable<IFeatureAction> actions, FeatureContext ctx)
   220	    {
   221	        if (actions == null || ctx == null) return;
   222	        foreach (var action in actions)
   223	        {
   224	            action?.Execute(ctx);
   225	        }
   226	    }
   227	
   228	    // ==================== 内部工具 ====================
   229	
   230	    /// <summary>获取 FeatureHandlerId（允许为空，纯数据 Feature 可以没有处理器）</summary>
   231	    private static string GetFeatureHandlerId(IEntity feature)
   232	    {
   233	        var handlerId = feature.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureHandlerId);
   234	        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(handlerId)) return handlerId;
   235	        return string.Empty;
   236	    }
   237	
   238	    /// <summary>将 Feature.Modifiers snapshot 字段施加到 Owner.Data（Granted 阶段调用）</summary>
   239	    private static void ApplyModifiers(IEntity feature, IEntity owner)
   240	    {
   241	        var modifiers = feature.Data.Get<FeatureModifierEntryData[]>(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureModifiers);
   242	        if (modifiers.Length == 0) return;
   243	
   244	        int applied = 0;
   245	        foreach (var entry in modifiers)
   246	        {
   247	            if (entry == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(entry.DataKeyName)) continue;
   248	
   249	            var modifier = new DataModifier(
   250	                type: entry.ModifierType,
   251	                value: entry.Value,
   252	                priority: entry.Priority,
   253	                source: feature
   254	            );
   255	            owner.Data.AddModifier(entry.DataKeyName, modifier);
   256	            applied++;
   257	        }
   258	
   259	        if (applied > 0)
   260	            _log.Debug($"Feature {feature.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name)} 施加 {applied} 个修改器");
   261	    }
   262	
   263	    /// <summary>按来源批量回滚修改器（Removed 阶段调用）</summary>
   264	    private static void RemoveModifiers(IEntity feature, IEntity owner)
   265	    {
   266	        owner.Data.RemoveModifiersBySource(feature);
   267	        _log.Debug($"Feature {feature.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name)} 修改器已回滚");
   268	    }
   269	}
     1	/// <summary>
     2	/// 发出事件动作 - 通过 Owner 或 Feature 的局部 EventBus 发出一个事件
     3	///
     4	/// 适合触发跨系统通信，如通知 UI 更新、触发音效、通知 AI 等。
     5	/// </summary>
     6	public class EmitEventAction : IFeatureAction
     7	{
     8	    /// <summary>要发出的事件数据对象（类型即事件标识）</summary>
     9	    public object? EventData { get; set; }
    10	
    11	    /// <summary>在 Owner 的事件总线上发出（true = Owner，false = Feature）</summary>
    12	    public bool EmitOnOwner { get; set; } = true;
    13	
    14	    public void Execute(FeatureContext ctx)
    15	    {
    16	        if (EventData == null) return;
    17	
    18	        if (EmitOnOwner)
    19	            ctx.Owner?.Events.EmitDynamic(EventData);
    20	        else
    21	            ctx.Feature?.Events.EmitDynamic(EventData);
    22	    }
    23	}

     1	/// <summary>
     2	/// Ability 子域接入 FeatureSystem 的统一中转处理器。
     3	/// 只负责把通用 FeatureContext 转为 CastContext，并把执行阶段转交给具体技能逻辑。
     4	/// </summary>
     5	internal abstract class AbilityFeatureHandler : IFeatureHandler
     6	{
     7	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(AbilityFeatureHandler));
     8	
     9	    /// <summary>完整唯一 FeatureHandlerId，对应 AbilityData.FeatureHandlerId。</summary>
    10	    public abstract string FeatureId { get; }
    11	
    12	    /// <summary>
    13	    /// FeatureSystem 调用入口。
    14	    /// </summary>
    15	    /// <param name="featureContext">Feature 运行上下文。</param>
    16	    /// <returns>技能执行结果。</returns>

    32	    /// <returns>技能执行结果。</returns>

     1	using Godot;
     2	
     3	/// <summary>
     4	/// 技能系统 - 管理技能激活和执行逻辑
     5	/// 
     6	/// 职责：
     7	/// - 接收 TryTrigger 请求（统一施法入口）
     8	/// - 激活技能（就绪检查 → 消耗 → 冷却 → 执行）
     9	/// - 通过 FeatureSystem / IFeatureHandler.OnExecute 执行具体技能逻辑并回传 AbilityExecutedResult
    10	/// 
    11	/// 注意：技能 owner 清单由 AbilityInventoryService 负责，EntityManager_Ability 仅保留兼容转发。
    12	/// </summary>
    13	public static class AbilitySystem
    14	{
    15	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(AbilitySystem));
    16	
    17	    // ==================== TryTrigger 入口 ====================
    18	
    19	    /// <summary>
    20	    /// 处理 TryTrigger 事件 - 统一施法入口
    21	    /// </summary>
    22	    public static void HandleTryTrigger(GameEventType.Ability.TryTrigger eventData)
    23	    {
    24	        var context = eventData.Context;
    25	        var resultContext = context.ResponseContext;
    26	
    27	        if (context.Ability == null)
    28	        {
    29	            _log.Debug("TryTrigger 失败: Ability 为空");
    30	            resultContext?.SetResult(TriggerResult.Failed);
    31	            return;
    32	        }
    33	
    34	        var result = TryTriggerAbilityWithContext(context);
    35	        resultContext?.SetResult(result);
    36	    }
    37	
    38	    /// <summary>
    39	    /// 使用施法上下文触发技能（统一流水线入口）
    40	    /// </summary>
    41	    /// <returns>触发结果：Success / Failed</returns>
    42	    private static TriggerResult TryTriggerAbilityWithContext(CastContext abilityContext)
    43	    {
    44	        if (abilityContext.Ability == null || abilityContext.Caster == null) return TriggerResult.Failed;
    45	
    46	        // 拦截已死亡角色的技能请求，防止周期性光环等技能死后继续触发新一轮伤害判定。
    47	        if (abilityContext.Caster != null && abilityContext.Caster.Data.Get<bool>(GeneratedDataKey.IsDead))
    48	        {
    49	            _log.Debug($"技能触发失败: 施法者已阵亡");
    50	            return TriggerResult.Failed;
    51	        }
    52	
    53	        var ability = abilityContext.Ability;
    54	
    55	        // 事件驱动：就绪检查
    56	        if (!CanUseAbility(ability))
    57	        {
    58	            return TriggerResult.Failed;
    59	        }
    60	
    61	        // ==================== 资源消耗阶段 ====================
    62	        var consumeContext = new EventContext();
    63	        // 事件驱动：请求消耗资源（充能等）
    64	        if (ability.Data.Get<bool>(GeneratedDataKey.IsAbilityUsesCharges))
    65	        {
    66	            ability.Events.Emit(
    67	                new GameEventType.Ability.ConsumeCharge(consumeContext)
    68	            );
    69	        }
    70	
    71	        // 检查消耗是否成功
    72	        if (!consumeContext.Success)
    73	        {
    74	            _log.Debug($"消耗资源失败: {consumeContext.FailReason}");
    75	            return TriggerResult.Failed;
    76	        }
    77	
    78	        // 事件驱动:请求启动冷却
    79	        // 注意：如果是 Periodic (周期性) 技能，由 TriggerComponent 负责循环控制频率，
    80	        // 这里不应该再启动 CooldownComponent 的冷却计时，否则会导致 TriggerComponent 下次循环时
    81	        // 技能还在冷却中 (Race Condition) 或 刚结束冷却但 CanUse 检查失败。
    82	        // 因此：周期性技能跳过冷却启动。
    83	        var triggerMode = ability.Data.Get<AbilityTriggerMode>(GeneratedDataKey.AbilityTriggerMode);
    84	        if (!triggerMode.HasFlag(AbilityTriggerMode.Periodic))
    85	        {
    86	            ability.Events.Emit(
    87	                new GameEventType.Ability.StartCooldown()
    88	            );
    89	        }
    90	
    91	        // ==================== 消耗阶段 ====================
    92	        // 事件驱动:请求消耗成本 (魔法/能量等)
    93	        var costContext = new EventContext();
    94	        ability.Events.Emit(
    95	            new GameEventType.Ability.ConsumeCost(costContext)
    96	        );
    97	
    98	        if (!costContext.Success)
    99	        {
   100	            _log.Debug($"消耗成本失败: {costContext.FailReason}");
   101	            return TriggerResult.Failed;
   102	        }
   103	
   104	        // 标记为执行中
   105	        ability.Data.Set(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureIsActive, true);
   106	
   107	        // 发送激活事件，技能UI使用
   108	        ability.Events.Emit(
   109	            new GameEventType.Ability.Activated(abilityContext)
   110	        );
   111	
   112	        // Feature 生命周期钩子：Activated（AbilitySystem 负责构建 FeatureContext，将 CastContext 存入 ActivationData）
   113	        var featureCtx = new FeatureContext
   114	        {
   115	            Owner = abilityContext.Caster,
   116	            Feature = ability,
   117	            ActivationData = abilityContext,
   118	            Source = abilityContext.SourceEventData
   119	        };
   120	        FeatureSystem.OnFeatureActivated(featureCtx);
   121	
   122	        EmitAbilityExecutedEvent(abilityContext, featureCtx);
   123	
   124	        // Feature 生命周期钩子：Ended（同步技能同帧完成；异步/引导型能力后续可延迟调用）
   125	        FeatureSystem.OnFeatureEnded(featureCtx, FeatureEndReason.Completed);
   126	
   127	        var name = ability.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name);
   128	        _log.Debug($"激活技能: {name}");
   129	        return TriggerResult.Success;
   130	    }
   131	
   132	    // ==================== 就绪检查 ====================
   133	
   134	    /// <summary>
   135	    /// 检查技能是否可用
   136	    /// </summary>
   137	    public static bool CanUseAbility(AbilityEntity ability)
   138	    {
   139	        if (ability == null) return false;
   140	
   141	        var abilityName = ability.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name);
   142	        var isEnabled = ability.Data.Get<bool>(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureEnabled);
   143	        var isActive = ability.Data.Get<bool>(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureIsActive);
   144	
   145	        // 检查启用状态
   146	        if (!isEnabled)
   147	        {
   148	            _log.Debug($"技能 {abilityName} 未启用");
   149	            return false;
   150	        }
   151	
   152	        // 检查Feature是否激活，也就是技能是否在执行中
   153	        if (isActive)
   154	        {
   155	            _log.Debug($"技能 {abilityName} 正在执行中");
   156	            return false;
   157	        }
   158	
   159	        // 事件驱动：请求检查可用性（冷却、充能等组件响应）
   160	        var context = new EventContext();
   161	        ability.Events.Emit(
   162	            new GameEventType.Ability.CheckCanUse(context)
   163	        );
   164	
   165	        if (!context.Success)
   166	        {
   167	            _log.Debug($"技能 {abilityName} 不可用: {context.FailReason}");
   168	            return false;
   169	        }
   170	
   171	        return true;
   172	    }
   173	
   174	    // ==================== 效果执行 ====================
   175	
   176	    /// <summary>
   177	    /// 发送技能执行完成事件 - 结果由 IFeatureHandler.OnExecute 写入 FeatureContext.ExecuteResult
   178	    /// </summary>
   179	    private static void EmitAbilityExecutedEvent(CastContext context, FeatureContext featureCtx)
   180	    {
   181	        if (context.Ability == null) return;
   182	
   183	        var ability = context.Ability;
   184	        var abilityName = ability.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.Name) ?? string.Empty;
   185	        var handlerId = ability.Data.Get<string>(GeneratedDataKey.FeatureHandlerId);
   186	        AbilityExecutedResult result;
   187	
   188	        if (featureCtx.ExecuteResult is AbilityExecutedResult executedResult)
   189	        {
   190	            result = executedResult;
   191	        }
   192	        else
   193	        {
   194	            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(handlerId))
   195	            {
   196	                _log.Error($"技能 {abilityName} 未配置 FeatureHandlerId，执行结果将回退为默认值");
   197	            }
   198	            else if (!FeatureHandlerRegistry.HasHandler(handlerId))
   199	            {
   200	                _log.Warn($"技能 {abilityName} 未注册 FeatureHandler: {handlerId}，执行结果将回退为默认值");
   201	            }
   202	            else
   203	            {
   204	                _log.Warn($"技能 {abilityName} 的 FeatureHandler 未写入 AbilityExecutedResult，执行结果将回退为默认值");
   205	            }
   206	
   207	            result = new AbilityExecutedResult
   208	            {
   209	                TargetsHit = context.Targets?.Count ?? 0
   210	            };
   211	        }
   212	
   213	        _log.Debug($"[AbilitySystem] 技能效果执行完成: '{abilityName}', 命中: {result.TargetsHit}");
   214	
   215	        // 发送执行完成事件
   216	        ability.Events.Emit(
   217	            new GameEventType.Ability.Executed(result)
   218	        );
   219	    }
   220	}
     1	using System.Collections.Generic;
     2	
     3	/// <summary>
     4	/// 施法上下文 - 携带施法过程中的所有必要信息
     5	/// 
     6	/// 用途：
     7	/// - 由 TriggerComponent 创建并传递给 AbilitySystem
     8	/// - 由 AbilitySystem 装入 FeatureContext.ActivationData，供 IFeatureHandler.OnExecute 读取
     9	/// 
    10	/// 设计原则：
    11	/// - 替代 _TriggerEventData 存入 Data 的做法
    12	/// - 一次性上下文，不存入 Entity.Data
    13	/// </summary>
    14	public class CastContext
    15	{
    16	    /// <summary>施法者实体</summary>
    17	    public IEntity? Caster { get; set; }
    18	
    19	    /// <summary>技能实体</summary>
    20	    public AbilityEntity? Ability { get; set; }
    21	
    22	    /// <summary>
    23	    /// 请求的目标列表
    24	    /// - 手动指定时由 TriggerComponent 或输入系统填充
    25	    /// - 自动选择时由具体技能 Handler 在 ExecuteAbility 中填充
    26	    /// </summary>
    27	    public List<IEntity>? Targets { get; set; }
    28	
    29	    /// <summary>
    30	    /// 请求的目标位置 (点施法技能)
    31	    /// </summary>
    32	    public Godot.Vector2? TargetPosition { get; set; }
    33	
    34	    /// <summary>
    35	    /// 玩家的输入方向 (用于无目标时的默认指向)
    36	    /// </summary>
    37	    public Godot.Vector2 InputDirection { get; set; }
    38	
    39	    /// <summary>
    40	    /// 触发源事件数据 (事件触发技能时携带)
    41	    /// 例如：OnDamaged 触发时，携带 DamageEventData
    42	    /// </summary>
    43	    public object? SourceEventData { get; set; }
    44	
    45	    /// <summary>
    46	    /// 事件请求-响应上下文
    47	    /// 用于跨事件处理器回传结果（如 TriggerResult）
    48	    /// </summary>
    49	    public EventContext? ResponseContext { get; set; }
    50	
    51	    /// <summary>
    52	    /// 是否已预选目标
    53	    /// true = 已由外部或具体技能 Handler 指定目标
    54	    /// </summary>
    55	    public bool HasPreselectedTargets => Targets != null && Targets.Count > 0;
    56	
    57	    /// <summary>
    58	    /// 是否已预选位置
    59	    /// </summary>
    60	    public bool HasPreselectedPosition => TargetPosition.HasValue;
    61	}

```

     6	/// <summary>

    10	/// - Manual: 手动触发。主动技能，响应玩家按键输入。
    11	/// - OnEvent: 事件触发。被动技能，监听游戏内特定事件（如：杀敌、受伤、闪避）。
    12	/// - Periodic: 周期触发。被动技能，固定时间间隔执行（如：每 5 秒回一次血）。
    13	/// - Permanent: 永久生效。通常用于属性加成类被动，添加即生效。

    15	/// </summary>

   158	    /// <summary>
   159	    /// 启动周期触发定时器
   160	    /// </summary>
   161	    private void StartPeriodicTimer()
   162	    {
   163	        if (_data == null || _entity is not AbilityEntity ability) return;
   164	
   165	        float interval = _data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.AbilityCooldown);
   166	        if (interval <= 0f) return;
   167	
   168	        // 取消旧的定时器

   170	
   171	        // 创建新的循环定时器
   172	        _periodicTimer = TimerManager.Instance.Loop(

   174	            new TimerOptions(

   178	                "AbilityPeriodicTrigger"),

   184	    /// <summary>

   187	    private void OnPeriodicTimerTick()
   188	    {

   190	
   191	        TriggerAbility();
   192	    }
   193	
   194	    private void CancelPeriodicTimer()
   195	    {
   196	        if (!_periodicTimer.IsValid) return;
   197	        TimerManager.Instance?.Cancel(_periodicTimer, TimerCancelReason.ComponentUnregistered);
   198	        _periodicTimer = default;

   205	    /// <summary>

   208	    private void OnEventTriggered(object eventData)
   209	    {
   210	        if (_data == null || _entity is not AbilityEntity ability) return;
   211	
   212	        // 1. 检查触发概率 (AbilityTriggerChance)
   213	        // 规则：概率统一为 0-100
   214	        float chance = _data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.AbilityTriggerChance);
   215	        if (!MyMath.CheckProbability(chance))
   216	        {
   217	            return;
   218	        }

   223	    // ================= 触发执行 =================
   224	
   225	    /// <summary>
   226	    /// 核心触发逻辑：发送 TryTrigger 请求，由 AbilitySystem 统一处理。
   227	    /// </summary>
   228	    /// <param name="source">触发源事件数据（事件触发时携带）</param>
   229	    private void TriggerAbility(object? source = null)
   230	    {
   231	        if (_entity is not AbilityEntity ability) return;
   232	
   233	        // 查找施法者
   234	        var caster = AbilityInventoryService.Runtime.GetOwner(ability);
   235	
   236	        // 创建施法上下文
   237	        var context = new CastContext
   238	        {
   239	            Ability = ability,
   240	            Caster = caster,
   241	            SourceEventData = source,
   242	            ResponseContext = new EventContext()
   243	            // RequestedTargets 默认为 null，表示自动选取
   244	        };
   245	
   246	        // 发送 TryTrigger 请求，由 AbilitySystem 统一处理
   247	        // 包括：CanUse 检查、消耗资源、启动冷却、选择目标、执行效果
   248	        _entity.Events.Emit(
   249	            new GameEventType.Ability.TryTrigger(context)
   250	        );
   251	
   252	        _log.Debug($"触发技能请求: {AbilityName}");
   253	    }
   254

   256	
   257	    /// <summary>

   272	            return false;

### 000138 agent_message `commentary`

我读到 `TriggerComponent` 里事件触发动态订阅当前还是 TODO，说明 Event 的 `OnDynamic/Action<object>` 并不是已经稳定使用的主链路；真正需要强制裁决的是“不再把 dynamic/object 作为未来事件协议”。Feature/Ability 现在用 `FeatureContext.ActivationData/ExecuteResult object?` 做子系统桥接，这比 EventBus 泛型路径更像是 AI-first 契约问题，应该单独成一份设计。

### 000147 function_call_output

**Output**

````text
Chunk ID: ddf232
Wall time: 0.0000 seconds
Process exited with code 0
Original token count: 1759
Output:
     1	# ObjectPool 工具入口
     2	
     3	> 状态：current
     4	> 定位：对象复用、池容量、Node 出入池基础生命周期和 Godot 物理根节点隔离策略入口。
     5	> 更新：2026-06-03
     6	
     7	## 一句话裁决
     8	
     9	ObjectPool 保留。根节点为 `CollisionObject2D` 的池化对象默认改为 `ParkedInTree` 场外常驻策略：回池后仍在 `SceneTree` 中，仍保留碰撞体，不 `RemoveChild`，不关闭碰撞，不改 layer/mask/shape，只隐藏、停处理、移动到分散 parking grid，并由统一碰撞逻辑 guard 拦截回池对象和激活首帧事件。
    10	
    11	ObjectPool 需要重构，但重构目标是把隐藏在 `ObjectPool<T>` 内部的 Node lifecycle、parking grid、runtime state 和 fallback detach 策略显式化，不是取消对象池，也不是把 ObjectPool 升级成 EntityManager。
    12	
    13	2026-06-03 重新校准后补充：这不应被简单写成“Godot 有 bug，所以脱树”。Godot 4.6 官方文档和社区 issue 共同指向的是 physics step、deferred 属性、broadphase pair 与 Area query flush 的时序约束。SlimeAI 现在的默认做法是不主动切碰撞属性、不脱树，改用显式 pool runtime state、激活第一 physics frame 不处理碰撞，以及 Godot validation artifact 证明旧事件不会进入业务。
    14	
    15	## 阅读顺序
    16	
    17	| 文档 | 用途 |
    18	| ---- | ---- |
    19	| [Concept.md](Concept.md) | 当前概念、职责边界、AI-first 裁决 |
    20	| [Usage.md](Usage.md) | API、初始化、两阶段激活、常见用法 |
    21	| [Tests.md](Tests.md) | `Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Tests` 当前问题、重构裁决、scene gate 与 artifact 设计 |
    22	| [Concepts/对象池.md](Concepts/对象池.md) | 历史对象池架构说明，保留作追溯 |
    23	| [../../Capabilities/Collision/Concepts/Godot物理时序与对象池碰撞.md](../../Capabilities/Collision/Concepts/Godot物理时序与对象池碰撞.md) | Godot 物理时序、场外常驻策略、碰撞逻辑 guard 和 fallback 边界 |
    24	| [../../../../SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/ObjectPool/README.md](../../../../SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/ObjectPool/README.md) | ObjectPool AI-first 生命周期工具设计包 |
    25	
    26	## 当前源码入口
    27	
    28	```text
    29	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Core/ObjectPool.cs
    30	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Core/IPoolable.cs
    31	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Management/ObjectPoolManager.cs
    32	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Management/ObjectPoolInit.cs
    33	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Lifecycle/
    34	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/RuntimeState/
    35	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Observability/ObjectPoolObservability.cs
    36	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Tests/Contracts/
    37	Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Tests/Validation/CollisionIsolation/
    38	Src/ECS/Runtime/Entity/Spawn/EntitySpawnPipeline.cs
    39	Src/ECS/Runtime/Entity/Manager/EntityManager.cs
    40	```
    41	
    42	## Owner 边界
    43	
    44	| Owner | 负责 | 不负责 |
    45	| ---- | ---- | ---- |
    46	| ObjectPool | `Get/Release/Activate`、容量、统计、池归属、Node 基础停用/启用、parking grid、pool runtime state、fallback detach | Data 初始化、Entity 注册、owner/source/target、阵营、伤害、命中语义 |
    47	| Entity Runtime | `Get(false)` 后的 Data / Visual / Transform / Component / Registry / Lifecycle 编排，完成后调用 `pool.Activate()` | Godot 物理 pair 细节 |
    48	| Collision Capability | `Area2D` 信号桥接、组件退场、事件过滤、pool runtime state guard、layer/mask 约定、场景结构门禁 | 对象复用、池容量、节点创建 |
    49	| Damage / Movement | 伤害结算、有效碰撞解释、移动停止/销毁策略 | 池化节点物理退场 |
    50	
    51	## 设计原则
    52	
    53	- 根节点是 `CollisionObject2D` 的池化对象默认 `ParkedInTree`，不脱树、不关碰撞、不改 layer/mask/shape。
    54	- `Get(false)` 仍只获取对象，不触发业务生命周期；Entity 初始化完成后才 `Activate()`。
    55	- `Activate()` 默认设置 `CollisionReadyPhysicsFrame = currentPhysicsFrame + 1`；激活第一帧不处理业务碰撞。
    56	- parking grid 是降低停车区 pair 压力的手段，不是业务正确性的唯一证明。
    57	- 业务事件必须二次过滤：实体仍有效、未在池中、已过 ready frame、目标仍有效、team / owner / lifecycle 仍匹配。
    58	- ObjectPool 观测应从池级统计扩展到节点级状态：是否在池中、`CollisionLogicActive`、`CollisionReadyPhysicsFrame`、parking position、上次 acquire/release 帧和位置。
    59	- `Detach` / `disable_mode=REMOVE` 保持 fallback / control check：只在 validation 证明需要时显式启用，不再作为根 `CollisionObject2D` 默认路径。
    60	
    61	## 不推荐
    62	
    63	- 回到默认脱树 / 默认关碰撞；这会让 `ParkedInTree` 方案失去意义。
    64	- 只靠 `Monitoring`、`Monitorable`、`CollisionShape2D.Disabled`、`CollisionLayer=0` 或 `ProcessMode.Disabled` 当默认策略。
    65	- 给所有 Node 一律脱树，导致 UI、纯数据对象、Timer 和非物理节点承担不必要的场景树副作用。
    66	- 让 ObjectPool 写 Data、注册 Component、判断伤害、改阵营或发业务命中事件。
    67	- 把 pool runtime state 写进 `Entity.Data` 的不清空分区。
    68	
    69	## Tests / Validation 入口
    70	
    71	当前 `Src/ECS/Tools/ObjectPool/Tests` 只保留两个自动验证入口：
    72	
    73	- `Tests/Contracts/ObjectPoolContractRuntimeTest.tscn`
    74	- `Tests/Validation/CollisionIsolation/ObjectPoolCollisionIsolationValidation.tscn`
    75	
    76	验证拆两层：
    77	
    78	| 层级 | 目标 | 门禁 |
    79	| --- | --- | --- |
    80	| Runtime contract | `Tests/Contracts/` 验证 `Get/Release/Activate`、统计、容量、重复归还、manager mapping、隔离池名 | 可自动运行的 contract checks，不依赖 UI。 |
    81	| Godot collision validation | `Tests/Validation/CollisionIsolation/` 验证 `Area2D` / `CharacterBody2D` 根节点回池场外常驻、激活首帧不进业务、raw callback 到 business event oracle、parking grid 压力和 fallback detach 对照 | scene README 五字段 + PASS artifact + `checks[]`。 |
    82	
    83	历史 UI demo 和 demo fixture 已删除，不再作为当前事实源。
    84	
    85	详细测试设计见 [Tests.md](Tests.md)。
    86	
    87	## 验证入口
    88	
    89	文档阶段：
    90	
    91	```bash
    92	python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all
    93	git diff --check
    94	```
    95	
    96	代码阶段：
    97	
    98	```bash
    99	dotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly
   100	```
   101	
   102	涉及 Godot 物理行为时，还需要在承载游戏仓补 scene smoke 和日志分析。

     1	using Godot;
     2	using System;
     3	using System.Collections.Generic;

     5	
     6	/// <summary>
     7	/// 实体目标选择器。
     8	/// 负责从已注册实体中筛出满足几何范围、阵营/类型过滤、排序与数量限制的目标集合。
     9	///
    10	/// 执行顺序：
    11	/// 1) 几何候选收集（或 Chain 路径生成）；
    12	/// 2) 阵营与类型过滤；
    13	/// 3) 排序（Chain 保留路径顺序不排序）；
    14	/// 4) MaxTargets 截断。
    15	/// </summary>
    16	public static class EntityTargetSelector
    17	{
    18	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(EntityTargetSelector));
    19	
    20	    /// <summary>
    21	    /// 查询并返回符合条件的实体列表。
    22	    /// 支持常规几何范围扫描（Circle/Ring/Box/Line/Cone/Global）。
    23	    /// </summary>
    24	    /// <param name="query">查询配置参数</param>
    25	    /// <returns>符合条件的 List&lt;IEntity&gt;</returns>
    26	    public static List<IEntity> Query(TargetSelectorQuery query)
    27	    {
    28	        var candidates = new List<IEntity>();
    29	
    30	        if (query.Geometry == GeometryType.Single)
    31	        {
    32	            // Single 模式通常需要外部预选目标
    33	            candidates = new List<IEntity>();
    34	        }
    35	        else
    36	        {
    37	            // 遍历全量 Node2D 实体并执行几何命中判定。
    38	            foreach (var entity in GetAllNode2DEntities())
    39	            {
    40	                if (entity is Node2D node2D)
    41	                {
    42	                    if (GeometryCalculator.IsPointInGeometry(node2D.GlobalPosition, query))
    43	                    {
    44	                        candidates.Add(entity);
    45	                    }
    46	                }
    47	            }
    48	
    49	            candidates = FilterTargets(candidates, query.CenterEntity, query.TeamFilter, query.TypeFilter);
    50	        }
    51	
    52	        if (candidates.Count > 1)
    53	        {
    54	            SortTargets(candidates, query.Origin, query.Sorting);
    55	        }
    56	
    57	        if (query.MaxTargets > 0 && candidates.Count > query.MaxTargets)
    58	        {
    59	            candidates = candidates.GetRange(0, query.MaxTargets);
    60	        }
    61	
    62	        return candidates;
    63	    }
    64	
    65	    /// <summary>
    66	    /// 对候选目标执行通用过滤：阵营、类型、生命周期状态。
    67	    /// 会过滤 Dead / Reviving 实体，避免选中无效目标。
    68	    /// </summary>
    69	    private static List<IEntity> FilterTargets(List<IEntity> targets,
    70	        IEntity? centerEntity,
    71	        TeamFilter teamFilter,
    72	        EntityType typeFilter)
    73	    {
    74	        var filtered = new List<IEntity>();
    75	        foreach (var target in targets)
    76	        {
    77	            if (!PassTeamFilter(target, centerEntity, teamFilter)) continue;
    78	            if (!PassTypeFilter(target, typeFilter)) continue;
    79	            if (target.Data.Has(GeneratedDataKey.LifecycleState))
    80	            {
    81	                var state = target.Data.Get<LifecycleState>(GeneratedDataKey.LifecycleState);
    82	                if (state == LifecycleState.Dead || state == LifecycleState.Reviving) continue;
    83	            }
    84	
    85	            filtered.Add(target);
    86	        }
    87	
    88	        return filtered;
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    /// <summary>
    92	    /// 阵营过滤判定。
    93	    /// 若 filter 为 None 或 All 则直接放行；
    94	    /// 若目标为自身则仅由 Self 标志决定；
    95	    /// 其余按 center 与 target 阵营关系判定 Friendly / Enemy / Neutral。
    96	    /// </summary>
    97	    private static bool PassTeamFilter(IEntity target, IEntity? center, TeamFilter filter)
    98	    {
    99	        if (filter == TeamFilter.None || filter == TeamFilter.All) return true;
   100	        bool isSelf = IsSameEntity(target, center);
   101	        if (isSelf) return filter.HasFlag(TeamFilter.Self);
   102	        Team targetTeam = target.Data.Get<Team>(GeneratedDataKey.Team);
   103	        if (targetTeam == Team.Neutral) return filter.HasFlag(TeamFilter.Neutral);
   104	        if (center == null) return false;
   105	        Team centerTeam = center.Data.Get<Team>(GeneratedDataKey.Team);
   106	        bool isSameTeam = centerTeam == targetTeam;
   107	        if (isSameTeam) return filter.HasFlag(TeamFilter.Friendly);
   108	        return filter.HasFlag(TeamFilter.Enemy);
   109	    }
   110	
   111	    /// <summary>
   112	    /// 类型过滤判定。
   113	    /// 当 filter 为 EntityType.None 时视为不过滤；否则需要目标存在 EntityType 且命中位掩码。
   114	    /// </summary>
   115	    private static bool PassTypeFilter(IEntity target, EntityType filter)
   116	    {
   117	        if (filter == EntityType.None) return true;
   118	        if (!target.Data.Has(GeneratedDataKey.EntityType)) return false;
   119	        EntityType entityType = target.Data.Get<EntityType>(GeneratedDataKey.EntityType);
   120	        return filter.HasFlag(entityType);
   121	    }
   122	
   123	    /// <summary>
   124	    /// 对目标集合执行排序。
   125	    /// 排序仅改变顺序，不改变元素集合；随机排序使用 Fisher-Yates 洗牌。
   126	    /// </summary>
   127	    private static void SortTargets(List<IEntity> targets, Vector2 origin, TargetSorting sorting)
   128	    {
   129	        switch (sorting)
   130	        {
   131	            case TargetSorting.None: break;
   132	            case TargetSorting.Nearest:
   133	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   134	                    GetEntityPosition(a).DistanceTo(origin).CompareTo(GetEntityPosition(b).DistanceTo(origin)));
   135	                break;
   136	            case TargetSorting.Farthest:
   137	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   138	                    GetEntityPosition(b).DistanceTo(origin).CompareTo(GetEntityPosition(a).DistanceTo(origin)));
   139	                break;
   140	            case TargetSorting.LowestHealth:
   141	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   142	                    a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.CurrentHp).CompareTo(b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.CurrentHp)));
   143	                break;
   144	            case TargetSorting.HighestHealth:
   145	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   146	                    b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.CurrentHp).CompareTo(a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.CurrentHp)));
   147	                break;
   148	            case TargetSorting.HighestHealthPercent:
   149	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   150	                    b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.HpPercent).CompareTo(a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.HpPercent)));
   151	                break;
   152	            case TargetSorting.LowestHealthPercent:
   153	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   154	                    a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.HpPercent).CompareTo(b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.HpPercent)));
   155	                break;
   156	            case TargetSorting.Random:
   157	                Random rng = new Random();
   158	                for (int i = targets.Count - 1; i > 0; i--)
   159	                {
   160	                    int j = rng.Next(i + 1);
   161	                    (targets[i], targets[j]) = (targets[j], targets[i]);
   162	                }
   163	
   164	                break;
   165	            case TargetSorting.HighestThreat:
   166	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   167	                    (b.Data.Has(GeneratedDataKey.Threat) ? b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.Threat) : 0).CompareTo(
   168	                        a.Data.Has(GeneratedDataKey.Threat) ? a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.Threat) : 0));
   169	                break;
   170	        }
   171	    }

   176	    /// </summary>
   177	    private static bool IsSameEntity(IEntity? a, IEntity? b)
   178	    {
   179	        if (a == b) return true;
   180	        if (a is Node n1 && b is Node n2) return n1 == n2;

     1	using Godot;
     2	using System;
     3	using System.Collections.Generic;
     4	using System.Linq;
     5	
     6	/// <summary>
     7	/// Component 注册器。
     8	/// <para>只维护 Entity 与 Component 的内部 owner 索引，不再通过 EntityRelationshipManager 暴露组件归属关系。</para>
     9	/// </summary>
    10	public sealed class ComponentRegistrar
    11	{
    12	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(ComponentRegistrar), LogLevel.Debug);
    13	
    14	    private readonly EntityRegistry? _entityRegistry;
    15	    private readonly Dictionary<Node, HashSet<Node>> _componentsByEntity = new();
    16	    private readonly Dictionary<Node, Node> _entityByComponent = new();
    17	    private readonly Dictionary<Type, HashSet<Node>> _componentsByType = new();
    18	
    19	    public ComponentRegistrar(EntityRegistry? entityRegistry = null)
    20	    {
    21	        _entityRegistry = entityRegistry;
    22	    }
    23	
    24	    /// <summary>
    25	    /// 递归扫描并注册指定 Entity 下的所有 Component。
    26	    /// </summary>
    27	    public int RegisterComponents(Node? entity)
    28	    {
    29	        if (entity == null)
    30	            return 0;
    31	
    32	        return RegisterComponents(entity, FindComponentNodes(entity));
    33	    }
    34	
    35	    /// <summary>
    36	    /// 使用外部已扫描的 Component 列表注册，供 EntityManager 复用预热缓存。
    37	    /// </summary>
    38	    public int RegisterComponents(Node? entity, IEnumerable<Node> components)
    39	    {
    40	        if (entity == null)
    41	            return 0;
    42	
    43	        var registeredCount = 0;
    44	        foreach (var component in components.Distinct().ToArray())
    45	        {
    46	            if (RegisterComponent(entity, component))
    47	                registeredCount++;
    48	        }
    49	
    50	        return registeredCount;
    51	    }
    52	
    53	    /// <summary>
    54	    /// 注册单个 Component，并建立内部 owner 反查索引。
    55	    /// </summary>
    56	    public bool RegisterComponent(Node? entity, Node? component)
    57	    {
    58	        if (entity == null || component == null || entity == component)
    59	            return false;
    60	
    61	        if (_entityRegistry != null && _entityRegistry.GetEntityId(entity).IsEmpty)
    62	        {
    63	            _log.Warn($"Entity 未注册到 EntityRegistry，跳过 Component 注册: {entity.Name}");
    64	            return false;
    65	        }
    66	
    67	        if (!IsComponentNode(component))
    68	            return false;
    69	
    70	        if (_entityByComponent.TryGetValue(component, out var existingOwner))
    71	        {
    72	            if (existingOwner != entity)
    73	                _log.Warn($"Component 已归属其他 Entity，跳过重复注册: {component.Name}");
    74	
    75	            return false;
    76	        }
    77	
    78	        NodeLifecycleManager.Register(component);
    79	
    80	        if (!_componentsByEntity.TryGetValue(entity, out var components))
    81	        {
    82	            components = new HashSet<Node>();
    83	            _componentsByEntity[entity] = components;
    84	        }
    85	
    86	        components.Add(component);
    87	        _entityByComponent[component] = entity;
    88	        AddTypeIndex(component);
    89	
    90	        if (component is IComponent iComponent)
    91	        {
    92	            try
    93	            {
    94	                iComponent.OnComponentRegistered(entity);
    95	            }
    96	            catch (Exception ex)
    97	            {
    98	                _log.Error($"Component 注册回调失败: {component.GetType().Name}, error={ex.Message}");
    99	            }
   100	        }
   101	
   102	        return true;
   103	    }
   104	
   105	    /// <summary>
   106	    /// 注销指定 Entity 的全部 Component，不销毁节点本身。
   107	    /// </summary>
   108	    public int UnregisterComponents(Node? entity)
   109	    {
   110	        if (entity == null)
   111	            return 0;
   112	
   113	        var components = GetComponents(entity).ToArray();
   114	        var unregisteredCount = 0;
   115	
   116	        foreach (var component in components)
   117	        {
   118	            if (UnregisterComponent(entity, component))
   119	                unregisteredCount++;
   120	        }
   121	
   122	        return unregisteredCount;
   123	    }
   124	
   125	    /// <summary>
   126	    /// 移除 Component：注销索引和生命周期注册，并释放节点。
   127	    /// </summary>
   128	    public bool RemoveComponent(Node? entity, Node? component)
   129	    {
   130	        if (!UnregisterComponent(entity, component))
   131	            return false;
   132	
   133	        if (component != null && GodotObject.IsInstanceValid(component))
   134	            component.QueueFree();
   135	
   136	        return true;
   137	    }
   138	
   139	    /// <summary>
   140	    /// 注销单个 Component，不释放节点。
   141	    /// </summary>
   142	    public bool UnregisterComponent(Node? entity, Node? component)
   143	    {
   144	        if (entity == null || component == null)
   145	            return false;
   146	
   147	        if (!_entityByComponent.TryGetValue(component, out var owner) || owner != entity)
   148	            return false;
   149	
   150	        if (component is IComponent iComponent)
   151	        {
   152	            try
   153	            {
   154	                iComponent.OnComponentUnregistered();
   155	            }
   156	            catch (Exception ex)
   157	            {
   158	                _log.Error($"Component 注销回调失败: {component.GetType().Name}, error={ex.Message}");
   159	            }
   160	        }
   161	
   162	        RemoveIndexes(entity, component);
   163	        NodeLifecycleManager.Unregister(component);
   164	        return true;
   165	    }
   166	
   167	    public IReadOnlyList<Node> GetComponents(Node? entity)
   168	    {
   169	        if (entity == null || !_componentsByEntity.TryGetValue(entity, out var components))
   170	            return Array.Empty<Node>();
   171	
   172	        return components.ToArray();
   173	    }
   174	
   175	    public T? GetComponent<T>(Node? entity) where T : Node
   176	    {
   177	        return GetComponents(entity).OfType<T>().FirstOrDefault();
   178	    }
   179	
   180	    public IEnumerable<T> GetComponentsByType<T>() where T : Node
   181	    {
   182	        return _entityByComponent.Keys.OfType<T>().ToArray();
   183	    }
   184	
   185	    public Node? GetEntityByComponent(Node? component)
   186	    {
   187	        return component != null && _entityByComponent.TryGetValue(component, out var entity)
   188	            ? entity
   189	            : null;
   190	    }
   191	
   192	    public void Clear()
   193	    {
   194	        _componentsByEntity.Clear();
   195	        _entityByComponent.Clear();
   196	        _componentsByType.Clear();
   197	    }
   198	
   199	    private static IEnumerable<Node> FindComponentNodes(Node entity)
   200	    {
   201	        return entity
   202	            .FindChildren("*", "Node", true, false)
   203	            .OfType<Node>()
   204	            .Where(IsComponentNode)
   205	            .ToArray();
   206	    }
   207	
   208	    private static bool IsComponentNode(Node node)
   209	    {
   210	        return node is IComponent || node.GetType().Name.EndsWith("Component", StringComparison.Ordinal);
   211	    }
   212	
   213	    private void AddTypeIndex(Node component)
   214	    {
   215	        var type = component.GetType();
   216	        if (!_componentsByType.TryGetValue(type, out var components))
   217	        {
   218	            components = new HashSet<Node>();
   219	            _componentsByType[type] = components;
   220	        }
   221	
   222	        components.Add(component);
   223	    }
   224	
   225	    private void RemoveIndexes(Node entity, Node component)
   226	    {
   227	        _entityByComponent.Remove(component);
   228	
   229	        if (_componentsByEntity.TryGetValue(entity, out var ownerComponents))
   230	        {
   231	            ownerComponents.Remove(component);
   232	            if (ownerComponents.Count == 0)
   233	                _componentsByEntity.Remove(entity);
   234	        }
   235	
   236	        foreach (var pair in _componentsByType.ToArray())
   237	        {
   238	            pair.Value.Remove(component);
   239	            if (pair.Value.Count == 0)
   240	                _componentsByType.Remove(pair.Key);
   241	        }
   242	    }
   243	}

    85	    private readonly string _contextName;
    86	
    87	    /// <summary> 当前实例默认的日志等级 </summary>
    88	    private readonly LogLevel _localLevel;
    89	
    90	    /// <summary>
    91	    /// 创建一个新的日志实例。
    92	    /// 推荐用法：在类中声明 static readonly Log Log = new Log("ClassName");
    93	    /// </summary>
    94	    /// <param name="contextName">上下文名称，将显示在日志中并用于过滤</param>
    95	    /// <param name="localLevel">该实例特定的日志等级。如果不设置，将默认跟随 GlobalLevel</param>
    96	    public Log(string contextName, LogLevel localLevel = LogLevel.None)
    97	    {
    98	        _contextName = contextName;
    99	        _localLevel = localLevel;
   100	    }
   101	
   102	    /// <summary>
   103	    /// 追踪日志：最细粒度的运行时流转信息。
   104	    /// 注意：此方法标记了 [Conditional("DEBUG")]，在非 DEBUG 编译模式下会被编译器完全忽略，零性能损耗。
   105	    /// </summary>
   106	    /// <param name="message">要打印的内容</param>
   107	    [Conditional("DEBUG")]
   108	    public void Trace(object message)
   109	    {
   110	        LogInternal(LogLevel.Trace, message, "TRACE", ColorTrace);
   111	    }
   112	
   113	    /// <summary>
   114	    /// 调试日志：关键变量或逻辑点调试信息。
   115	    /// 注意：此方法标记了 [Conditional("DEBUG")]，在非 DEBUG 编译模式下会被编译器完全忽略，零性能损耗。
   116	    /// </summary>
   117	    /// <param name="message">要打印的内容</param>
   118	    [Conditional("DEBUG")]
   119	    public void Debug(object message)
   120	    {
   121	        LogInternal(LogLevel.Debug, message, "DEBUG", ColorDebug);
   122	    }
   123	
   124	    /// <summary>
   125	    /// 信息日志：通用的运行状态或关键步骤说明。
   126	    /// </summary>
   127	    /// <param name="message">要打印的内容</param>
   128	    public void Info(object message)
   129	    {
   130	        LogInternal(LogLevel.Info, message, "INFO", ColorInfo);
   131	    }
   132	
   133	    /// <summary>
   134	    /// 成功日志：突出显示某个关键操作已成功完成。
   135	    /// </summary>
   136	    /// <param name="message">要打印的内容</param>
   137	    public void Success(object message)
   138	    {
   139	        LogInternal(LogLevel.Success, message, "SUCCESS", ColorSuccess);
   140	    }
   141	
   142	    /// <summary>
   143	    /// 警告日志：表示程序遇到了非预期情况但仍可继续运行。
   144	    /// 除了在 Output 打印，还会调用 GD.PushWarning 以便在 Godot 的 Debugger 面板显示。
   145	    /// </summary>
   146	    /// <param name="message">要打印的内容</param>
   147	    public void Warn(object message)
   148	    {
   149	        if (ShouldLog(LogLevel.Warning))
   150	        {
   151	            // 推送到 Godot 编辑器的错误/警告列表
   152	            GD.PushWarning(FormatRawMessage(message, "WARNING"));
   153	            // 打印带颜色的 Rich Text
   154	            LogInternal(LogLevel.Warning, message, "WARNING", ColorWarn, checkFilter: false);
   155	        }
   156	    }
   157	
   158	    /// <summary>
   159	    /// 错误日志：表示程序遇到了严重问题或异常。
   160	    /// 除了在 Output 打印，还会调用 GD.PushError 以便在 Godot 的 Debugger 面板中高亮红色显示。
   161	    /// </summary>
   162	    /// <param name="message">要打印的内容</param>
   163	    public void Error(object message)
   164	    {
   165	        if (ShouldLog(LogLevel.Error))
   166	        {
   167	            // 推送到 Godot 编辑器的错误列表
   168	            GD.PushError(FormatRawMessage(message, "ERROR"));
   169	            // 打印带颜色的 Rich Text
   170	            LogInternal(LogLevel.Error, message, "ERROR", ColorError, checkFilter: false);
   171	        }
   172	    }
   173	
   174	    // ================= 内部逻辑 =================
   175	
   176	    /// <summary>
   177	    /// 判断当前日志等级是否允许打印。
   178	    /// </summary>
   179	    /// <param name="level">当前要打印的日志等级</param>
   180	    /// <returns>True 表示允许打印</returns>
   181	    private bool ShouldLog(LogLevel level)
   182	    {
   183	        // 1. 检查特定上下文过滤器 (最高优先级，由 Log.SetLevel 设置)
   184	        if (_contextFilters.TryGetValue(_contextName, out LogLevel filterLevel))
   185	        {
   186	            return level >= filterLevel;
   187	        }
   188	
   189	        // 2. 如果实例设置了特定等级 (不是 None)，则以实例等级为准
   190	        if (_localLevel != LogLevel.None)
   191	        {
   192	            return level >= _localLevel;
   193	        }
   194	
   195	        // 3. 否则跟随全局等级
   196	        return level >= GlobalLevel;
   197	    }
   198	
   199	    /// <summary>
   200	    /// 核心打印方法，负责格式化字符串并调用 Godot 的 PrintRich。
   201	    /// </summary>
   202	    /// <param name="level">日志等级</param>
   203	    /// <param name="message">消息内容</param>
   204	    /// <param name="tag">标签字符串 (如 DEBUG, INFO)</param>
   205	    /// <param name="color">BBCode 颜色值</param>
   206	    /// <param name="checkFilter">是否需要进行过滤检查</param>
   207	    private void LogInternal(LogLevel level, object message, string tag, string color, bool checkFilter = true)
   208	    {
   209	        if (checkFilter && !ShouldLog(level)) return;
   210	
   211	        // 构建时间戳字符串
   212	        string timestampStr = ShowTimestamp ? $"[{Time.GetTimeStringFromSystem()}]" : "";
   213	
   214	        // 构建上下文信息字符串 [类名]
   215	        string contextInfoStr = ShowContext ? $"[{_contextName}]" : "";
   216	
   217	        // 使用 GD.PrintRich 输出
   218	        GD.PrintRich($"[color={color}]{timestampStr}[{tag}]{contextInfoStr} {message}[/color]");
   219	    }
   220	
   221	    /// <summary>
   222	    /// 格式化原始消息字符串，不包含 BBCode 标签。
   223	    /// </summary>
   224	    private string FormatRawMessage(object message, string tag)
   225	    {
   226	        return $"[{tag}][{_contextName}] {message}";
   227	    }
   228	}
   229	

```

Chunk ID: ac622c
Wall time: 0.0000 seconds
